query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueAccessToken TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueRefreshToken TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueUserId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueConnectedAt BIGINT NULL;
